title: [MTR3/4] BR InterCity 225 Set
description: Resource pack that adds BR Intercity 225 sets into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview
![Intercity 225](https://i.imgur.com/PCkNzIj.png)
The InterCity 225 is a high-speed electric push-pull train introduced by British Rail between 1989 and 1991, as part of the modernization of the East Coast Main Line. It consists of a Class 91 electric locomotive, nine Mark 4 coaches, and a Driving Van Trailer (DVT). The locomotive was built by BREL (Crewe Works), while the coaches and DVT were constructed by Metro-Cammell in Birmingham and Breda in Italy.

Designed for speeds up to 140 mph (225 km/h), the train is limited in regular service to 125 mph (201 km/h) due to signaling and infrastructure constraints. The Class 91 locomotive delivers around 4.7 MW (6,300 hp) at the rails. A notable achievement occurred during testing on 17 September 1989, when locomotive 91010 reached a British electric locomotive speed record of 161.7 mph.

The standard formation includes a locomotive at the north end, followed by nine Mark 4 coaches—including both standard and first-class seating—culminating in the DVT at the London end. This configuration provides a total capacity of 535 seats, with 406 standard-class and 129 first-class seats.

## InterCity 225 in Minecraft (MTR mod)

This resource pack adds the InterCity 225 into Minecraft using the Minecraft Transit Railway mod. The original model was created by cw_315 for Transport Fever 2 and was ported to Minecraft by Vitor2005 in 2025. It is compatible with both MTR3 and MTR4.

Included Liveries

- InterCity (original 1990s livery)
- LNER
  
# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, British Rail, London North Eastern Railway (LNER), Transport Fever 2, the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, or cw_315.
